diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 44e3766..1e4e856 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -414,2 +414,7 @@ Day 441 / Week 63 observations:
 - Remaining base is all S2 C. With no acquisition and tiny usage, the optimal posture is minimum fixed cost and no discretionary spend.
 - Week 63 adjustment: move capacity to tier 0, keep all model tiers at 1, reduce quotas to A=100/B=250/C=250, keep ops/dev/ad spend at $0, and leave promotions off.
+
+Day 448 / Week 64 observations:
+- Cash is $1.616M. Subscribers, enterprise seats, usage, and open issues are effectively zero.
+- No business remains to actively manage; the goal is minimizing residual platform cost until the simulation ends.
+- Week 64 adjustment: keep tier-0 capacity, all model tiers at 1, set all quotas to 0, and keep ops/dev/ad/promotions at $0.
